meaning: n.(火山、感情等)爆发、喷出,突发,破裂
examples: There was an extraordinary outburst of applause from every corner of the auditorium.
What lay behind this strange outburst?
She was alarmed by his violent outburst.
Mr Henry's outburst came as MSPs were grilling Sir John and human resources officer Paul Gray.
When you work in new media, every outburst is available on Twitter or YouTube.
